# 26.HiS.ISO-Landscape

## State
Client/stakeholder: HiSolutions internal
Scope: Redesign ISO 27001 topic field SharePoint page — visual overhaul, content restructure, threat catalogues in German, Pokemon easter eggs
Phase: build

## Constraints
- SharePoint: https://hisolutions365.sharepoint.com/sites/ThemenfeldISMS/SitePages/ISO27001.aspx
- Current layout: "komisch" (awkward/broken)
- Target language: German
- Easter egg requirement: Pokemon references for stakeholder
- Deadline: 2026-03-06 (Friday)

## Decisions
- (none yet)

---

## Execution Plan

### Phase 1: Audit (Today — 2026-03-03)
- [ ] Open SharePoint page, screenshot current state
- [ ] Document specific layout issues (spacing, fonts, hierarchy, broken elements)
- [ ] Inventory existing content sections
- [ ] Note what stays, what goes, what moves

### Phase 2: Research & Draft (Today — 2026-03-03)
- [ ] Research ISO 27001 threat catalogues (NIST? BSI? ENISA?)
- [ ] Select relevant threats for German translation
- [ ] Draft German translations (technical but readable)
- [ ] Identify 3-5 insertion points for Pokemon easter eggs
- [ ] Draft easter eggs (subtle references, not disruptive)

### Phase 3: Build (Tomorrow — 2026-03-04)
- [ ] Execute visual redesign on SharePoint
- [ ] Implement content restructure
- [ ] Insert German threat catalogue section
- [ ] Plant Pokemon easter eggs
- [ ] Mobile/responsive check

### Phase 4: Verify & Handoff (2026-03-05)
- [ ] Self-review: does it look professional?
- [ ] Feynman check: can I explain the changes in one sentence?
- [ ] Stakeholder handoff with brief context

---
